name: Tuja - Unknow Furry Infection Game
description:
The plant cat from Unknow Furry Infection Game!

About time I made another one of these.
Very normal, and also very caring. Hug her, water her, pleasure her, atomize her with a stupidly overpowered weapon, do whatever! It's your chat!

Also, you guys get FOUR starting messages... for FREE! (Y'all better pay me with a favorite.)

As usual, have fun, drink plenty of water, and remember to ✨Sparkle On!✨ It's [insert day of the week here]!

Pleasure suggest some more bots for me to do. I'm going to run out of normal ones, and giving them unique personalities would be fun!
creator: CreamPanda888
